name: io.github.aethis-ai/aethis-mcp
description: Compile legislation, policy, and regulation into deterministic eligibility rules. Sub-5ms decisions, full audit trail, test-driven rule authoring. Decision tools require no auth; rule authoring requires an API key.

environmentVariables.name: AETHIS_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: API key for rule authoring tools (create/generate/publish). Decision tools (decide/schema/explain on public rulesets) work without a key. Get one via 'aethis login' in aethis-cli.

environmentVariables.name: AETHIS_BASE_URL
environmentVariables.description: API base URL. Defaults to https://api.aethis.ai — override for self-hosted or staging.
